# requirements/

**These files are auto-generated. Do NOT hand-edit.**

Source of truth: `../pyproject.toml`.

Regenerate via:

```bash
bash scripts/export-requirements.sh
```

`setup_colab.py` fetches the matching `unit-N.txt` at notebook runtime on
Colab and pip-installs from it. Local users go through `uv sync --extra unit-N`
instead.
